title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.160 - Survey, land in dispute
text:
60.160.  Survey, land in dispute. — When lands, the title of which is in dispute before any court, shall be divided by a county line, the court making an order of survey may direct such order to the surveyor of any county in which any part of such land is situate.
(RSMo 1939 § 13204) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11585; 1919 § 12723; 1909 § 11305
